query:
SELECT i.id AS "item_id!",
                   count(v.id) AS "vote_count!"
            FROM roadmap_items AS i
            LEFT JOIN roadmap_votes AS v
              ON v.item_id = i.id
            WHERE i.tenant_id = $1 AND i.project_id = $2
            GROUP BY i.id
            ORDER BY count(v.id) DESC, i.created_at DESC
            LIMIT $3
